channel.title: cli on William Fang
channel.description: Recent content in cli on William Fang

item.title: Evans: gRPC 交互式测试工具
item.description: 安装 到项目主页，找到发布地址，然后下载相应操作系统下的可执行文件。 cd /tmp wget https://github.com/ktr0731/evans/releases/download/0.9.0/evans_linux_amd64.tar.gz tar -xvf evans_linux_amd64.tar.gz ## 复制到系统路径 sudo mv evans /usr/local/bin 使用 evans --host 127.0.0.1 --port 50051 helloworld.proto ______ | ____| | |__ __ __ __ _ _

item.title: speedtest cli
item.description: speedtest-cli pip install speedtest-cli speedtest-cli pip install speedtest-cli Collecting speedtest-cli Downloading http://mirrors.aliyun.com/pypi/packages/c4/44/dfebd38c5fb35aae0a7279e2a3ffe33ca65edb449a586b93addc8d409a71/speedtest_cli-2.1.2-py2.py3-none-any.whl Installing collected packages: speedtest-cli Successfully installed speedtest-cli-2.1.2 You are using pip version 9.0.1, however version 20.0.2 is available. You should consider upgrading via the 'pip install --upgrade pip' command. speedtest-clis Retrieving speedtest.net configuration... Testing from Hangzhou Alibaba Advertising Co.,Ltd. (47.98.117.71)... Retrieving speedtest.net server list... Selecting best server based on ping... Hosted by Beijing Unicom (Beijing) [1.67 km]: 31.03

item.title: 命令行启动 TeamViewer
item.description: 连接远程服务器 我们通过 TeamViewer 连接服务器，可以很方便的监控到远程服务器的运行状况，比如交易系统的界面是否正常启动、相关的 crontab 操作是否及时开启等。 可是
